evidence: Valid and invalid research-state fixtures exercised through public CLI tests.
Malformed, missing, unsupported version, invalid enum, and identifier variants are rejected.
Unsupported workflow state is rejected by schema_integrity as unsupported_workflow_state.
Phase 3 pipeline decisions remain exercised across valid and invalid fixtures.
All Phase 3 validators run before DOCX rendering in build-artifact.
Arabic RTL, mixed Unicode, long heading, and multiple-footnote cases render structurally valid DOCX.
limitations: Renderer does not claim Microsoft Word field update.

evidence: DOCX validator rejects unsafe packages and accepts generated artifacts.
limitations: Structural validation is not visual review and not Word acceptance.

evidence: Real 60-second Word smoke returned TIMEOUT.
Last checkpoint was dispatch_started.
Word PID was null because DispatchEx did not return; ownership was not verified.
Worker cleanup was worker_terminated and no final output was present.
limitations: WORD_VALIDATED is prohibited unless Word opens, updates, saves, closes, reopens, closes, and post-validates.

evidence: Manifest schema validates and hashes match generated files.
JSON, compact JSON, text output, invalid JSON, unknown args, and timeout bounds are tested.
Success, validation failure, input error, and Word gate codes are exercised.
Traversal, absolute output escape, reserved names, collision, partial failure, copy failure, and atomic replace failure are tested.
limitations: Symlink escape is skipped only when OS privileges do not allow symlink creation.

evidence: Separate builds produce identical renderer DOCX SHA-256 and stable manifest semantics after expected path normalization.
limitations: Word-generated output is not claimed byte-deterministic.

evidence: python -m build failed because module build is not installed.
Direct setuptools.build_meta build failed because setuptools is not installed in the active Python environment.
pip wheel/install local attempts failed with Windows permission errors in temporary build directories.
limitations: No dependency installation from the internet was performed, so package smoke remains environment-blocked.

evidence: Technical docs describe structural vs Word validation, timeout, exit codes, claims, and cleanup boundaries.
limitations: Public README visual polish is deferred to Phase 6.
